title: Terms of Service
body: Welcome. By registering as a business customer you agree to these terms. You must be 18 or older and a registered business owner in Country A. Orders are processed Monday through Saturday; Sundays and public holidays are excluded. Payment is due on delivery; accepted methods are cash, UPI, and pre-authorized bank transfer. Returns are permitted within 48 hours of delivery for defective or incorrect items only. Perishable goods cannot be returned once accepted. You may close your account at any time by contacting support; outstanding balances must be settled before closure.

title: सेवा की शर्तें
body: स्वागत है। एक व्यापार ग्राहक के रूप में पंजीकरण करके आप इन शर्तों से सहमत होते हैं। आपकी उम्र 18 वर्ष या उससे अधिक होनी चाहिए और आप देश A में पंजीकृत व्यापार के मालिक होने चाहिए। ऑर्डर सोमवार से शनिवार तक संसाधित होते हैं। भुगतान डिलीवरी पर देय है; नकद, UPI, और पूर्व-अनुमोदित बैंक हस्तांतरण स्वीकार किया जाता है। रिटर्न केवल दोषपूर्ण या गलत वस्तुओं के लिए डिलीवरी के 48 घंटे के भीतर अनुमत है।

title: Privacy Policy
body: We collect business name, contact information, order history, and device identifiers. Data is stored in Country A data centers and is not shared outside the platform without your consent. You may request a copy of your data or request deletion by contacting support. Data retention after account closure is 90 days, after which all personal data is anonymized or deleted.

title: गोपनीयता नीति
body: हम व्यवसाय का नाम, संपर्क जानकारी, ऑर्डर इतिहास, और डिवाइस पहचानकर्ता एकत्र करते हैं। डेटा देश A के डेटा केंद्रों में संग्रहीत किया जाता है। आप समर्थन से संपर्क करके अपने डेटा की प्रतिलिपि या हटाने का अनुरोध कर सकते हैं। खाता बंद होने के बाद डेटा प्रतिधारण 90 दिन है।

title: How do I close my account?
body: You can close your account by contacting support at any time. Before closure, any pending orders must be delivered or cancelled, and any outstanding balance must be paid in full. Once closure is processed your data is retained for 90 days, then anonymized.

title: मैं अपना खाता कैसे बंद करूं?
body: आप किसी भी समय समर्थन से संपर्क करके अपना खाता बंद कर सकते हैं। बंद करने से पहले, किसी भी लंबित ऑर्डर को वितरित या रद्द किया जाना चाहिए और किसी भी बकाया राशि का भुगतान पूरा किया जाना चाहिए।

title: What is your return policy?
body: Returns are accepted within 48 hours of delivery for defective or incorrect items. Perishable goods cannot be returned once accepted and signed for. To initiate a return, contact support with your order number and photos of the defect.

title: आपकी वापसी नीति क्या है?
body: दोषपूर्ण या गलत वस्तुओं के लिए डिलीवरी के 48 घंटे के भीतर रिटर्न स्वीकार किए जाते हैं। खराब होने वाली वस्तुओं को स्वीकार करने और हस्ताक्षर करने के बाद वापस नहीं किया जा सकता।

title: When will my order be delivered?
body: Orders placed before 2 PM Monday through Friday are delivered the next business day. Orders placed after 2 PM or on Saturday are delivered within 2 business days. Deliveries do not happen on Sundays or public holidays.

title: What payment methods do you accept?
body: We accept cash on delivery, UPI, and pre-authorized bank transfer. Credit card payments are not currently supported in Country A. Invoices can be settled within 7 days of delivery for approved customers.

title: Festival Offer
body: Get 15 percent off bulk orders during the festival season. Offer valid Monday through Saturday through the end of the month. Minimum order value 5000. Applicable on first order of the month only.

title: त्योहार की पेशकश
body: त्योहार के मौसम में थोक आदेशों पर 15 प्रतिशत की छूट पाएं। प्रस्ताव महीने के अंत तक सोमवार से शनिवार तक वैध। न्यूनतम ऑर्डर मूल्य 5000।

title: Terms of Service
body: By using the platform in Country B you accept these terms. Eligible customers are registered businesses with a valid tax ID. Orders can be placed 24 hours a day but are processed and dispatched only during business hours Monday through Friday. Payment is due at the time of order and may be made by credit card, debit card, or bank transfer. Returns are accepted within 7 days of delivery for any reason, and within 30 days for defective items. Account closure requires settling all balances; pending orders do not block closure and will be refunded.

title: Términos del Servicio
body: Al usar la plataforma en el país B usted acepta estos términos. Los clientes elegibles son empresas registradas con un identificador fiscal válido. Los pedidos se pueden realizar las 24 horas del día pero se procesan y despachan solo durante horario comercial de lunes a viernes. El pago vence al momento del pedido y se puede realizar con tarjeta de crédito, tarjeta de débito, o transferencia bancaria. Se aceptan devoluciones dentro de los 7 días posteriores a la entrega por cualquier razón, y dentro de los 30 días para artículos defectuosos. El cierre de cuenta requiere liquidar todos los saldos; los pedidos pendientes no bloquean el cierre y serán reembolsados.

title: Privacy Policy
body: We collect business name, tax ID, contact information, order history, payment method metadata (but not card numbers), and device identifiers. Data is stored in Country B and complies with local data protection law. You have the right to access, correct, and delete your data. Data retention after account closure is 180 days. Consent to marketing communications is optional and can be withdrawn at any time.

title: Política de Privacidad
body: Recopilamos nombre comercial, identificador fiscal, información de contacto, historial de pedidos, metadatos del método de pago (no los números de tarjeta), y identificadores de dispositivo. Los datos se almacenan en el país B y cumplen con la ley local de protección de datos. Usted tiene derecho a acceder, corregir y eliminar sus datos. La retención de datos después del cierre de la cuenta es de 180 días. El consentimiento para comunicaciones de marketing es opcional y puede retirarse en cualquier momento.

title: How do I close my account?
body: You can request account closure at any time from your profile settings or by contacting support. Any outstanding balance must be settled. Pending orders will be cancelled and refunded automatically. Data is retained for 180 days after closure in accordance with local law.

title: ¿Cómo cierro mi cuenta?
body: Puede solicitar el cierre de cuenta en cualquier momento desde la configuración de su perfil o contactando al soporte. Cualquier saldo pendiente debe ser liquidado. Los pedidos pendientes serán cancelados y reembolsados automáticamente. Los datos se retienen por 180 días después del cierre de conformidad con la ley local.

title: What is your return policy?
body: You may return any item within 7 days of delivery for a full refund, no questions asked. Defective items may be returned within 30 days. Returns are initiated from your order history page or by contacting support. Refunds are issued to the original payment method within 5 business days of receipt.

title: ¿Cuál es su política de devoluciones?
body: Puede devolver cualquier artículo dentro de los 7 días posteriores a la entrega para un reembolso completo, sin preguntas. Los artículos defectuosos pueden devolverse dentro de los 30 días. Las devoluciones se inician desde la página de historial de pedidos o contactando al soporte. Los reembolsos se emiten al método de pago original dentro de los 5 días hábiles posteriores a la recepción.

title: When will my order be delivered?
body: Standard delivery is 2 to 3 business days from order confirmation. Express delivery, when available at checkout, is 1 business day for an additional fee. Deliveries are made Monday through Friday between 9 AM and 6 PM. Saturday delivery is available in select metropolitan areas for an additional fee.

title: ¿Cuándo se entregará mi pedido?
body: La entrega estándar es de 2 a 3 días hábiles desde la confirmación del pedido. La entrega exprés, cuando está disponible al finalizar la compra, es de 1 día hábil por una tarifa adicional. Las entregas se realizan de lunes a viernes de 9 AM a 6 PM. La entrega los sábados está disponible en áreas metropolitanas seleccionadas por una tarifa adicional.

title: What payment methods do you accept?
body: We accept all major credit and debit cards, bank transfer, and approved net-30 terms for qualified business customers. Cash on delivery is not available in Country B. Invoices are issued on request and can be paid within the terms agreed at account setup.

title: ¿Qué métodos de pago aceptan?
body: Aceptamos todas las tarjetas de crédito y débito principales, transferencia bancaria, y términos aprobados a 30 días para clientes comerciales calificados. El pago contra entrega no está disponible en el país B. Las facturas se emiten a solicitud y pueden pagarse dentro de los términos acordados al configurar la cuenta.

title: New Customer Offer
body: First-time customers get 10 percent off their first order over 1000. Use code WELCOME10 at checkout. Offer cannot be combined with other promotions and is valid through the end of the quarter.

title: Oferta para Nuevos Clientes
body: Los nuevos clientes obtienen 10 por ciento de descuento en su primer pedido superior a 1000. Use el código WELCOME10 al finalizar la compra. La oferta no se puede combinar con otras promociones y es válida hasta el final del trimestre.

title: Terms of Service
body: These terms govern your use of the platform in Country C. You must be a legally registered business entity to open an account. Orders are confirmed by email and dispatched Monday through Friday. Payment options include credit card and invoice; invoices are due on net-30 terms. Returns are accepted within 14 days of delivery for any reason. Account closure is self-service and takes effect immediately, with data retention of 365 days for tax and audit purposes.

title: Conditions du Service
body: Ces conditions régissent votre utilisation de la plateforme dans le pays C. Vous devez être une entité commerciale légalement enregistrée pour ouvrir un compte. Les commandes sont confirmées par courriel et expédiées du lundi au vendredi. Les options de paiement incluent carte de crédit et facture; les factures sont dues à 30 jours nets. Les retours sont acceptés dans les 14 jours suivant la livraison pour toute raison. La fermeture de compte est en libre-service et prend effet immédiatement, avec une conservation des données de 365 jours à des fins fiscales et d'audit.

title: Privacy Policy
body: We collect business information, contact details, transaction history, and usage analytics. Data is stored in Country C and processed in compliance with provincial and federal privacy law. You have the right to access and correct your information at any time. Data retention is 365 days after account closure, after which personal data is deleted except where legally required to be kept longer.

title: Politique de Confidentialité
body: Nous recueillons les informations d'entreprise, les coordonnées, l'historique des transactions et les analyses d'utilisation. Les données sont stockées dans le pays C et traitées conformément aux lois provinciales et fédérales sur la vie privée. Vous avez le droit d'accéder et de corriger vos informations à tout moment. La conservation des données est de 365 jours après la fermeture du compte.

title: How do I close my account?
body: In Country C you can close your account directly from account settings. Closure takes effect immediately. Any unpaid invoices must be settled within 30 days of closure. Data is retained for 365 days for tax and audit purposes and then deleted.

title: Comment fermer mon compte?
body: Dans le pays C, vous pouvez fermer votre compte directement à partir des paramètres du compte. La fermeture prend effet immédiatement. Toute facture impayée doit être réglée dans les 30 jours suivant la fermeture. Les données sont conservées pendant 365 jours à des fins fiscales et d'audit puis supprimées.

title: What is your return policy?
body: You may return any item within 14 days of delivery for a full refund. The item must be in its original condition and packaging. Defective items can be returned within 60 days. Refunds are processed within 10 business days of receipt of the returned item.

title: Quelle est votre politique de retour?
body: Vous pouvez retourner tout article dans les 14 jours suivant la livraison pour un remboursement complet. L'article doit être dans son état et emballage d'origine. Les articles défectueux peuvent être retournés dans les 60 jours. Les remboursements sont traités dans les 10 jours ouvrables suivant la réception de l'article retourné.

title: When will my order be delivered?
body: Standard delivery is 3 to 5 business days. Rural and remote addresses may take longer. Express delivery is available for an additional fee and takes 1 to 2 business days. We do not deliver on weekends or statutory holidays.

title: What payment methods do you accept?
body: We accept credit card payments at checkout and offer net-30 invoicing for qualified business customers. To apply for net-30 terms, contact our billing team with your business registration and trade references.

title: Terms of Service
body: These terms apply to customers in Country D. You must be a registered business with a valid tax ID to use the platform. Orders are fulfilled within 1 business day. Payment is by credit card or invoice for approved accounts. Returns are accepted within 30 days of delivery in original condition. Account closure can be requested by email and takes effect within 5 business days.

title: Privacy Policy
body: We collect business information, contact details, order history, and usage data. We do not sell your data. Data retention is 2 years after account closure, in line with local tax and accounting requirements. You can request access to or deletion of your data at any time by contacting support.

title: How do I close my account?
body: Send a closure request to support by email. Closure takes effect within 5 business days. Any outstanding invoices must be paid before closure is finalized. Data is retained for 2 years for tax purposes and then deleted.

title: What is your return policy?
body: Items may be returned within 30 days of delivery in their original condition and packaging. A return authorization is required; contact support to obtain one. Refunds are issued to the original payment method within 7 business days of our receipt of the returned item.

title: When will my order be delivered?
body: Orders are fulfilled within 1 business day and delivered 2 to 4 business days later depending on your location. Same-day delivery is available in a limited set of cities for an additional fee.

title: How do I contact customer support?
body: Our support team is available Monday through Friday 8 AM to 6 PM local time. You can reach us by email or through the chat widget on the app. For urgent order issues please use the phone line listed in your account settings.

title: Now Serving Country D
body: We are now live in Country D. Sign up today and get free delivery on your first three orders. Offer valid for the first 90 days after account creation.

title: About the Platform
body: This platform connects registered business customers with suppliers for wholesale ordering. We operate in multiple countries with country-specific terms, pricing, and delivery networks. Each country has its own content, its own rules, and its own customer support team. Features and policies may differ from one country to another.
